text:
Once there was a cat that couldn't decide what kind of cat she wanted to be. One day, she saw a cat with a beautiful shade like moonlight on water. Another day, she wanted a sly cat like Sherlock Holmes. She spent many years chasing after both roles.

Eventually, after much hunting and dreaming, the cat decided to become... a whisperer of dreams.

She became skilled at guiding animals that could't talk, such as deer out of fog and dogs into the park. She found joy in helping little animals like mice who dreamed of flying.

But then she crossed a very serious cat. She fell into an ancient well thought extinct. To save herself, she used her magic. She transformed into a human-sized parqueeraconde—which sounds fancy.

Every night, the moonlight twinkled softly across the park she called home. Every night, she transformed into a creature most unusual.

She dreamed herself into homes all over the land. She danced with golden retrievals, learned
